mapper.select: select id, window_days, lv2_sign_in_days, lv3_sign_in_days, enabled, updated_by, update_time from user_level_rule_config where id = 1 limit 1
mapper.update: update user_level_rule_config set window_days = #{windowDays}, lv2_sign_in_days = #{lv2SignInDays}, lv3_sign_in_days = #{lv3SignInDays}, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, update_time = current_timestamp where id = 1
mapper.insert: insert into user_level_rule_config( id, window_days, lv2_sign_in_days, lv3_sign_in_days, enabled, updated_by, update_time ) values ( 1, #{windowDays}, #{lv2SignInDays}, #{lv3SignInDays}, #{enabled}, #{updatedBy}, current_timestamp )
